7 #include "EstimatorService.h"

20 using namespace Arcane;

22 //=======================================================================================
23 // Destructeur
24 //=======================================================================================
25 
26 EstimatorService::
27 ~EstimatorService()
28 {
29 
30 }
31 void EstimatorService::init(IMesh* mesh)
32 {
33  IAppServiceMng * app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
34  m_geometry_service = app_service_mng->find<IGeometryMng>(true);
35  m_geometry_service->addItemGroupProperty(mesh->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
36  m_geometry_service->addItemGroupProperty(mesh->allCells(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
37  /*
38  Int32Array item_lids;
39  item_lids.reserve(m_mesh->outerFaces().size()) ;
40  std::set<Integer> s ;
41  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,m_mesh->outerFaces())
42  {
43  Cell const& cell = iface->boundaryCell() ;
44  if(cell.isOwn())
45  {
46  Integer lid = cell->localId() ;
47  std::pair<std::set<Integer>::iterator,bool> iter = s.insert(lid) ;
48  if(iter.second)
49  {
50  item_lids.add(lid) ;
51  }
52  }
53  }
54  IItemFamily * cell_family = mesh->cellFamily();
55  // On cr�e le groupe de face des conditions limites
56  m_boundary_cell_group = cell_family->createGroup("TwoPtsEstimatorBoundaryCellGroup",item_lids);
57 
58  m_geometry_service->addItemGroupProperty(mesh->allActiveFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PNormal,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
59  */
60 }
61 
62 void EstimatorService::registerData(IMeshAdapter* adapter)
63 {
64  m_mesh_adapter = adapter ;
65  m_mesh_adapter->addObserver(&m_mesh_observer) ;
66  //m_mesh_adapter->registerUnrefinableCellGroup(m_boundary_cell_group) ;
67 }
68 
69 void EstimatorService::update(IMesh* mesh)
70 {
71  if(m_mesh_observer.hasChanged()||m_first_update)
72  {
73  CellGroup cells = mesh->allCells();
74  FaceGroup faces = mesh->allFaces();
75 
76  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(faces,
77  IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
78  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& c_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(cells,
79  IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
80 
81  CellGroup group ;
82  if(m_first_update)
83  {
84  group = cells ;
85  m_first_update = false ;
86  }
87  else
88  group = m_mesh_adapter->getJustAddedCells() ;
89 
90  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,group)
91  {
92  Real3 xC = c_centers[icell] ;
93  Real hsize = 0 ;
94  for(FaceEnumerator iface(icell->faces());iface.hasNext();++iface)
95  {
96  Real3 CF = xC - f_centers[*iface] ;
97  hsize = std::max(hsize,CF.abs()) ;
98  }
99  m_h_size[icell] = 2*hsize ;
100  }
101 
102  m_mesh_observer.reset() ;
103  }
104 }
105 //==========================================================================================
106 // D�riv�e (en espace, en temps ou mixte selon le type de l'estimateur lu dans le .arc)
107 //==========================================================================================
108 void
109 EstimatorService ::
110 computeDerivative(const VariableCellReal& variable,const VariableCellReal& variable_tn,Real dt,VariableCellReal & variable_result,IMesh *mesh)
111 {
112  if(m_mesh_observer.hasChanged()||m_first_update) update(mesh) ;
113 
114  TypesEstimator::eTypesEstimator estimator_type = options()->estimatorType();
115 
116  switch (estimator_type)
117  {
118  case (TypesEstimator::Dx):
119  firstOrderSpatialDerivative(variable, variable_result, mesh);
120  break;
121  case (TypesEstimator::Dt):
122  firstOrderTimeDerivative(variable, variable_tn, dt, variable_result, mesh);
123  break;
124  case (TypesEstimator::DtDx):
125  mixedDerivative(variable, variable_tn, dt, variable_result, mesh);
126  break;
127  default:
128  cout << "This case does not exist ! \n";
129  }
130 }
131 
132 //==========================================================================================
133 // D�riv�e en espace
134 //==========================================================================================
135 void
136 EstimatorService ::
137 firstOrderSpatialDerivative(const VariableCellReal& variable,VariableCellReal & variable_in_space, IMesh *mesh) // variable ---> saturation,pression...etc
138 {
139 
140  IAppServiceMng * app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
141  m_geometry_service= app_service_mng->find<IGeometryMng>(true);
142 
143  // On r�cup�re les centres des faces et des cellules
144 
145  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh->allFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
146  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& c_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh->allCells(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
147 
148  //const IGeometryMng::RealVariable& c_measures = m_geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(m_cells, IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
149  //const IGeometryMng::RealVariable& f_measures = m_geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
150  // D�riv�e en espace
151  variable_in_space.fill(0.);
152  m_counter.fill(0);
153 
154  ENUMERATE_FACE(iFace,mesh->allActiveFaces())
155  {
156  const Arcane::Face& face = *iFace ;
157  const Cell& bcell= face.backCell();
158  const Cell& fcell = face.frontCell();
159 
160  // Les centres des mailles
161  if(!face.isSubDomainBoundary())
162  {
163  const Real3 & C0 = c_centers[bcell];
164  const Real3 & C1 = c_centers[fcell];
165  const Real3 & CF = f_centers[face];
166 
167  // La difference entre les centres
168  Real3 s0F = CF - C0;
169  Real3 s1F = CF - C1;
170  //Real3 s01 = C1 - C0;
171 
172  // La distance
173  const Real d0F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s0F,s0F));
174  const Real d1F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s1F,s1F));
175  Real d01 = math::sqrt(d0F+d1F);
176 
177  // Le calcul de la d�riv�e
178 
179  variable_in_space[bcell]+=math::abs(variable[bcell] - variable[fcell])/d01 ;
180  variable_in_space[fcell]+=math::abs(variable[fcell] - variable[bcell])/d01 ;
181  m_counter[bcell]++;
182  m_counter[fcell]++;
183  if (variable_in_space[bcell]>10)
184  cout << "vb "<<variable[bcell]<<" vf "<<variable[bcell]<< " d01 "<<d01<< " h "<< m_h_size[bcell]<<" count "<<m_counter[bcell] << endl;
185  if (variable_in_space[fcell]>10)
186  cout << "vb "<<variable[bcell]<<" vf "<<variable[bcell]<< " d01 "<<d01<< " h "<< m_h_size[fcell]<<" count "<<m_counter[fcell] << endl;
187  }
188  else
189  {
190  if(bcell.localId() != -1)
191  m_counter[bcell]++;
192  else if(fcell.localId() != -1)
193  m_counter[fcell]++;
194  }
195  }
196 
197  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,mesh->allActiveCells())
198  {
199  variable_in_space[icell] *= m_h_size[icell]/m_counter[icell];
200  if (variable_in_space[icell]>10)
201  cout << "e "<<variable_in_space[icell]<<"vb "<<variable[icell]<<" v "<< " h "<< m_h_size[icell]<<" count "<<m_counter[icell] << endl;
202  }
203 
204 
205 }
206 
207 //================================================================================================
208 // D�riv�e en temps
209 //================================================================================================
210 void
211 EstimatorService::firstOrderTimeDerivative(const VariableCellReal& variable,const VariableCellReal& variable_tn,Real dt,VariableCellReal & variable_dt,IMesh *mesh)
212 {
213 
214  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,mesh->allActiveCells())
215  {
216  variable_dt[icell]= math::abs(variable[icell] - variable_tn[icell])/dt;
217  }
218 
219 }
220 
221 
222 //===============================================================================================
223 //La D�riv�e Mixte en Espace et en Temps
224 //===============================================================================================
225 void EstimatorService::mixedDerivative(const VariableCellReal& variable,const VariableCellReal& variable_tn,Real dt,VariableCellReal & variable_mixed,IMesh *mesh)
226 {
227  firstOrderSpatialDerivative(variable,variable_mixed,mesh) ; // 1 - On d�rive la variable � l'instant pr�c�dent en espace
228 
229  VariableCellReal tmp = VariableBuildInfo(mesh,"tmp"); //2- On derive la variable � l'instant tn en espace
230  firstOrderSpatialDerivative(variable_tn,tmp,mesh);
231 
232  firstOrderTimeDerivative(variable_mixed,tmp,dt,variable_mixed,mesh); //3- Enfin la d�rive en temps --> la deriv�e seconde
233 
234 }
235 
236 //=================================================================================================
237 // La NORME
238 //=================================================================================================
239 
240 Real EstimatorService::normL2(IMesh *mesh,const VariableCellReal & estimateur)
241 {
242 
243  Real tmp = 0.;
244 
245  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,mesh->allActiveCells())
246  {
247  tmp += (estimateur[icell]*estimateur[icell]);
248  }
249 
250  tmp=math::sqrt(tmp);
251  return tmp ;
252 
253 }
254 
255 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
256 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
257 Real
258 EstimatorService::
259 _computeCell3DDiameter(const Cell& cell,const IGeometryMng::RealVariable& c_measures,const IGeometryMng::RealVariable& f_measures) {
260 
261 
262  const Real cell_measure = c_measures[cell];
263  Real min_face_measure = std::numeric_limits<Real>::max();
264  Real max_face_measure = -std::numeric_limits<Real>::max();
265 
266  for(FaceEnumerator iface(cell.faces()); iface.hasNext(); ++iface) {
267  const Face& face = *iface;
268  min_face_measure = std::min(min_face_measure, f_measures[face]);
269  max_face_measure = std::max(max_face_measure, f_measures[face]);
270  }
271 
272  const Real hmin = 3*cell_measure / max_face_measure;
273  const Real hmax = 3*cell_measure / min_face_measure;
274 
275  return std::max(1/hmin,hmax);
276 }
277 //==============================================
278 // L'enregistrement du service
279 //==============================================
280 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_ESTIMATOR(Estimator,EstimatorService);
281
